overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along dirt trails through rolling grassy hills and rocky terrain on a bright sunny day. The character encounters a horse rider passing by and continues toward a distant camp with other riders visible in the valley ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow winding dirt trail between grassy hills

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through rolling grassy hills with scattered trees and wooden fencing

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback trots past the character on the right side of the trail at approximately 18 seconds

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through the terrain with visible wheel ruts
grass-covered hillside with scattered small plants and wildflowers
steep grassy embankment with patches of ferns and tall grass
weathered wooden posts and rails lining the right side of the path
tall deciduous trees dotting the hilltops against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by grassy slopes on both sides. Wooden fence posts line the right side of the path while scattered trees stand against the horizon. At approximately 18 seconds, a rider on horseback passes by on the right, briefly entering and exiting the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: widened dirt path through partially logged hillside with visible stumps

events.description: trail widens into a more open area with visible tree stumps and cleared vegetation on the right hillside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as it opens up, passing through an area with logged trees and stumps visible on the hillside

entered.detail: hillside with cut tree stumps and logging debris scattered across the slope
diverging dirt paths forming a Y-intersection in the trail
large granite boulders visible on the left side of the trail in the distance

changed.to: widened main trail with visible intersections

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wider area with a visible path intersection. The right side of the trail shows a cleared hillside with tree stumps and logging debris. Large rock formations appear in the distance on the left as the character continues walking through the more open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open trail alongside large granite rock outcroppings approaching a distant encampment

events.description: large rock outcroppings become prominent on the right side of the trail
distant riders on horses and camp smoke become visible ahead in the valley

agents.ego_description: walking toward a distant encampment with other riders, passing large rock formations on the right

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horseback gathered near a distant camp with visible smoke

entered.detail: massive granite boulders and rock face lining the right side of the path
encampment with figures and rising smoke visible in the valley ahead
expansive grassy field dropping off to the left with distant panoramic views

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside massive rock outcroppings that now dominate the right side of the trail. The landscape opens to reveal a distant encampment with riders on horseback and rising smoke visible in the valley ahead. The path continues toward this settlement through the open grassland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from a narrow, enclosed path into a vast, open valley. It begins with the character walking between grassy slopes lined with wooden fence posts, just as a rider on horseback passes by on the right. As the trail opens into a wider intersection, the scenery shifts to a cleared hillside marked by tree stumps and logging debris, while large rock formations emerge in the distance. The camera then follows the character alongside massive rock outcroppings that dominate the right side of the path before the landscape fully expands. Finally, the view opens to reveal a distant encampment with riders and rising smoke in the valley ahead, leading the character forward through the open grassland.
